'''鈭歯-j-m-v''' ('''kanajmevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrocopper|electrocopper]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrocopper|electrocopper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-j-m-v
|-
! Lemma
| kanajmevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinajmevoko|thinajmevoko]] || [[word:jinajmevoko|jinajmevoko]] || [[word:shinajmevoko|shinajmevoko]] || [[word:kinajmevoko|kinajmevoko]]
|-

|-
